name: datahihi1/tiny-env
description: A simple environment variable loader for PHP applications

suggest.ext-bcmath: Required for handling large numbers in .env values
suggest.datahihi1/tiny-env-validator: Validation helpers for tiny-env: rules and helpers to validate .env values
suggest.datahihi1/tiny-env-encryptor: Encryption helpers for tiny-env: encrypt and decrypt .env values
